ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* The due date for the task */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* The person or team to whom the task is assigned */,
  "effort" TEXT /* Estimated effort required to complete the task */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project the task belongs to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department the task belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  "dependency_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the task this task depends on */,
  "actual_effort" TEXT /* Actual effort spent on the task */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and feedback for the task */,
  "parent_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parent task (for hierarchical tasks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_dependency_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_parent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_effort FOREIGN KEY ("effort") REFERENCES efforts ("effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The expected end date of the project */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Project manager responsible for the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department the project belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager FOREIGN KEY ("manager") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efforts" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effort level */,
  "effort_level" TEXT /* Name of the effort level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the effort level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Numerical priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
